business_definition: Distinct active employees at FY2025 year-end.
calculation: Distinct count where employment_status is Active at FY2025 year-end.

business_definition: Employee exits divided by average headcount.
calculation: Use the supplied monthly rate or calculate exits / average_headcount.

business_definition: Average days required to close completed recruitment requisitions.
